person.name: Cecily de Samlesbury
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
1256 - The Manor Divided

In time, the absence of a male heir caused the manor to pass to Cospatric’s great-granddaughters – Margaret, Cecily and Elizabeth de Samlesbury. 

Samlesbury must have been quite a significant place, because two years later, the annual payment to the Crown was twelve shillings – a considerable sum, when compared to Oswaldtwistle, which paid ten shillings, and Ribchester, that paid two shillings, (plus a pair of gloves, or fourpence).  Neither Preston nor Blackburn is mentioned.

Margaret died childless c1267 and her second husband died in 1277. 

The manor was then divided into two moieties, (c1296).  Elizabeth, who had married Robert de Holand, received the Lower Hall division, whilst Cecily married John d’Ewyas, (c1259), and inherited the other half.  Sensibly, they established the second manor house at the opposite, (eastern), end of the parish, close to the Mellor estate, which John had acquired c1282.  A property on the Higher Hall site would probably already be in existence.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily de Samlesbury於大約1245年出生在英國藍卡爾薩苗萊斯波利時，她的父親William de Samlesbury27歲，母親Avina Notton27歲。她於1259年4月13日之前與Sir John Del Ewyas結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1311年2月6日之後在英國藍卡爾。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily de Samlesbury was born about 1245, in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, her father, William de Samlesbury, was 27 and her mother, Avina Notton, was 27. She married Sir John Del Ewyas before 13 April 1259. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 6 February 1311, in Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily de Samlesbury est née environ 1245, à Samlesbury, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, William de Samlesbury, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Avina Notton, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Del Ewyas avant 13 avril 1259. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 6 février 1311, à Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily de Samlesbury um 1245 in Samlesbury, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Samlesbury 27 und ihre Mutter Avina Notton 27. Sie hat vor 13. April 1259 Sir John Del Ewyas geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 6. Februar 1311 in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Samlesbury è nata il circa 1245 nel Samlesbury, Lancashire, England, sua padre, William de Samlesbury, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Avina Notton, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Del Ewyas prima del 13 aprile 1259. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 6 febbraio 1311, nel Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily de Samlesburyが約1245年にイギリスランカシュアイアサムレスブリーで生まれた時，父William de Samlesburyは27歳，母Avina Nottonは27歳であった。1259年4月13日以前にSir John Del Ewyasと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1311年2月6日以後にイギリスランカシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily de Samlesbury(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 랭카실르 샘레스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Samlesbury(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avina Notton(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1259년 4월 13일 이전 Sir John Del Ewyas(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1311년 2월 6일 이후 영국 랭카실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily de Samlesbury nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Samlesbury, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Avina Notton, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Del Ewyas antes 13 de abril de 1259. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 6 de fevereiro de 1311, em Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily de Samlesbury родилась около 1245 г. в местности сэмлесбури, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Samlesbury было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Avina Notton, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Del Ewyas перед 13 апрель 1259 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 6 февраль 1311 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия.

sm.about 1245–after 6 February 1311: e tusa o le 1245–ina ua ma'ea le 6 Fepuari 1311

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily de Samlesbury nació aproximadamente 1245, en Samlesbury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Samlesbury, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Avina Notton, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir John Del Ewyas antes de 13 de abril de 1259. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió después de 6 de febrero de 1311, en Lancashire, Inglaterra.
